candidates.why: The only explicit D&A row appears below gross profit within operating expenses, alongside overhead lines, not within or beneath the selected COGS row 'Cost of sales'. It does not appear to be COGS-specific D&A.

variables.notes: No separate COGS-related D&A row is visible. The explicit D&A line appears to belong to operating expenses below gross profit rather than to the selected COGS bucket.

candidates.why: This is an explicit operating D&A line shown separately at the same level as the selected overhead rows 'Employee compensation and benefits' and 'Other operational and administrative expenses'. Because XSGA_COMPONENTS previously excluded D&A and no SG&A subtotal row was selected, this separate D&A row should be added later to the XSGA bucket.

variables.notes: A separate operating D&A line exists above financial items and sits outside the selected XSGA component rows, so it should be added separately to avoid understating operating overhead.
